subcodes.first_line: O ye two God-worshipping Persians! For a thousand years, nay even more, have the Persian people been scattered and bereft of order and stability [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو پارسی خداپرست پارسیان هزار سال بلکه افزون بود پریشان و بی سر و سامان و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster, @call to action
